Trade.title: Trade
Trade.description: A trade executed by the bot

status.description: The status of the trade (e.g., OPEN, CLOSED)

side.description: The side of the trade (e.g., LONG, SHORT)

entryPrice.description: The entry price of the trade

exitPrice.description: The exit price of the trade

tradeAccountRawPercent.description: The amount the full account changed

reason.description: The reason for the trade execution

timestamp.description: The time the trade was recorded

status.description: The current status of the strategy (e.g., ACTIVE, IDLE)

signal.description: The current signal (e.g., LONG, SHORT, NEUTRAL)

confidence.description: The confidence level of the signal

lastUpdate.description: The time the strategy was last updated

/strategies/{strategyId}.description: Collection of all trading strategy signals
